findings.evidence: `rg -n "\bshow\b|\bchange\b"` reports line 654: `· exact (show Filter.Tendsto f (nhdsWithin 0 (Set.Ici 0)) (nhds x) from by`; unlike the documented `change` at line 732, this `show` has no local justification.
findings.fix: Factor this into a named local lemma such as `have hf_cont : Filter.Tendsto f ... := by ...` and then use `exact hf_cont.congr' ...`, or add a comment explaining why the type ascription is needed.
findings.issue: `exact (show Filter.Tendsto f ... from by ...).congr'` uses an undocumented `show` to reshape the proof of continuity of the modified integrand at 0, obscuring the intermediate fact being used.

summary: One proof still hides a substantive continuity subgoal behind an undocumented `show` type ascription; the rest of the previously flagged `change` issue is documented in the current code.
